title: Prospect worries about sounding generic
summary: The prospect worries that generic growth language will make the business sound like everyone else and hurt trust.
verbatim_quotes: "If it sounds like every other agency site, we lose before the conversation starts."
quotes: "If it sounds like every other agency site, we lose before the conversation starts."
